terms.term: The lessor shall be entitled to terminate the lease agreement in the event of breach of contract by the lessee.

translations.text: El arrendador tendrá derecho a rescindir el contrato de arrendamiento en caso de incumplimiento de contrato por parte del arrendatario.

terms.context: The lessor shall be entitled to terminate the lease agreement in the event of breach of contract by the lessee.

terms.term: By means of this power of attorney, the principal grants the agent full authority to represent him in all legal proceedings.

translations.text: Mediante este poder notarial, el poderdante otorga al apoderado facultades plenas para representarle en todos los procedimientos judiciales.

terms.context: By means of this power of attorney, the principal grants the agent full authority to represent him in all legal proceedings.

terms.term: All intellectual property rights arising from this agreement shall vest in the client upon full payment.

translations.text: Todos los derechos de propiedad intelectual que se deriven del presente acuerdo corresponderán al cliente tras el pago íntegro.

terms.context: All intellectual property rights arising from this agreement shall vest in the client upon full payment.

terms.term: Neither party shall be liable for any delay or failure to perform its obligations under this agreement if caused by a force majeure event.

translations.text: Ninguna de las partes será responsable de cualquier retraso o incumplimiento de sus obligaciones en virtud del presente acuerdo si se debe a un evento de fuerza mayor.

terms.context: Neither party shall be liable for any delay or failure to perform its obligations under this agreement if caused by a force majeure event.

terms.term: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this contract shall be referred to and finally resolved by arbitration.

translations.text: Cualquier controversia que surja de o en relación con este contrato se someterá a arbitraje y será resuelta definitivamente mediante el mismo.

terms.context: Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this contract shall be referred to and finally resolved by arbitration.

terms.term: The purchaser shall conduct a thorough due diligence review of the target company prior to closing.

translations.text: El comprador llevará a cabo una revisión exhaustiva de diligencia debida de la empresa objetivo antes del cierre.

terms.context: The purchaser shall conduct a thorough due diligence review of the target company prior to closing.

terms.term: In the event of delay in delivery, the contractor shall pay liquidated damages in the amount of 0.1% of the contract value per day.

translations.text: En caso de retraso en la entrega, el contratista pagará una cláusula penal del 0,1% del valor del contrato por día.

terms.context: In the event of delay in delivery, the contractor shall pay liquidated damages in the amount of 0.1% of the contract value per day.

terms.term: For the purposes of this non-disclosure agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any proprietary data disclosed by one party to the other.

translations.text: A los efectos del presente acuerdo de confidencialidad, "Información Confidencial" significará cualquier dato de propiedad divulgado por una parte a la otra.

terms.context: For the purposes of this non-disclosure agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any proprietary data disclosed by one party to the other.

terms.term: NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

translations.text: EN CONSECUENCIA, en consideración a las estipulaciones mutuas contenidas en el presente, las partes acuerdan lo siguiente:

terms.context: NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants contained herein, the parties agree as follows:

terms.term: The supplier agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the client from any claims arising from the supplier's negligence.

translations.text: El proveedor se obliga a indemnizar y mantener indemne al cliente de cualquier reclamación derivada de la negligencia del proveedor.

terms.context: The supplier agrees to indemnify and hold harmless the client from any claims arising from the supplier's negligence.

terms.term: The parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Madrid, Spain for the resolution of any disputes.

translations.text: Las partes se someten a la jurisdicción exclusiva de los tribunales de Madrid, Espańa para la resolución de cualquier controversia.

terms.context: The parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Madrid, Spain for the resolution of any disputes.

terms.term: If any provision of this agreement is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.

translations.text: Si alguna disposición del presente acuerdo se considerara inválida o inejecutable, las disposiciones restantes permanecerán en pleno vigor y efecto.

terms.context: If any provision of this agreement is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
Contrato de depósito en garantía

terms.term: The purchase price shall be deposited in an escrow account with a mutually agreed financial institution.

translations.text: El precio de compra se depositará en una cuenta de depósito en garantía en una entidad financiera acordada mutuamente.

terms.context: The purchase price shall be deposited in an escrow account with a mutually agreed financial institution.

terms.term: The licensee shall use its best endeavors to commercialize the licensed products in the territory.

translations.text: El licenciatario empleará sus mejores esfuerzos para comercializar los productos licenciados en el territorio.

terms.context: The licensee shall use its best endeavors to commercialize the licensed products in the territory.

terms.term: Upon payment of the claim, the insurer shall be subrogated to all rights of the insured against third parties.

translations.text: Tras el pago de la indemnización, la aseguradora se subrogará en todos los derechos del asegurado frente a terceros.

terms.context: Upon payment of the claim, the insurer shall be subrogated to all rights of the insured against third parties.

terms.term: The seller warrants that the goods are free from any encumbrances and defects in title.

translations.text: El vendedor garantiza que los bienes están libres de cualquier gravamen y defecto de título.

terms.context: The seller warrants that the goods are free from any encumbrances and defects in title.

terms.term: In consideration of the services provided, the company agrees to pay a monthly fee of €2,000.

translations.text: Como contraprestación por los servicios prestados, la sociedad se obliga a pagar una cuota mensual de 2.000€.

terms.context: In consideration of the services provided, the company agrees to pay a monthly fee of €2,000.

terms.term: The applicant must submit a completed visa application form together with all supporting documents no later than 15 days before the intended travel date.

translations.text: El solicitante deberá presentar un formulario de solicitud de visado cumplimentado junto con todos los documentos justificativos a más tardar 15 días antes de la fecha prevista de viaje.

terms.context: The applicant must submit a completed visa application form together with all supporting documents no later than 15 days before the intended travel date.

terms.term: A sworn translation issued by a duly authorized translator shall be required for all official documents submitted to Spanish public authorities.

translations.text: Se requerirá una traducción jurada emitida por un traductor jurado debidamente autorizado para todos los documentos oficiales presentados ante las autoridades públicas espańolas.

terms.context: A sworn translation issued by a duly authorized translator shall be required for all official documents submitted to Spanish public authorities.

terms.term: This agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, and agreements.

translations.text: El presente acuerdo constituye el acuerdo íntegro entre las partes y sustituye a todas las negociaciones, declaraciones y acuerdos anteriores.

terms.context: This agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, and agreements.
Persona jurídica / Entidad legal
123 Main Street, London, UK

terms.term: The deed must be executed before a notary public and subsequently registered with the relevant registry.

translations.text: La escritura debe otorgarse ante notario público e inscribirse posteriormente en el registro correspondiente.

terms.context: The deed must be executed before a notary public and subsequently registered with the relevant registry.

terms.term: Shareholders representing at least 25% of the share capital may request the convening of an extraordinary general meeting.

translations.text: Los accionistas que representen al menos el 25% del capital social podrán solicitar la convocatoria de una junta general extraordinaria.

terms.context: Shareholders representing at least 25% of the share capital may request the convening of an extraordinary general meeting.

terms.term: The company was declared insolvent and insolvency proceedings were commenced before the Commercial Court of Barcelona.

translations.text: La sociedad fue declarada insolvente y se inició un procedimiento concursal ante el Juzgado de lo Mercantil de Barcelona.

terms.context: The company was declared insolvent and insolvency proceedings were commenced before the Commercial Court of Barcelona.

terms.term: A judgment rendered by a court of a Member State shall be recognized and enforced in other Member States without any special procedure.

translations.text: Una sentencia dictada por un tribunal de un Estado miembro será reconocida y ejecutada en los demás Estados miembros sin ningún procedimiento especial.

terms.context: A judgment rendered by a court of a Member State shall be recognized and enforced in other Member States without any special procedure.
Acta de nombramiento de administrador

terms.term: The mortgage deed shall be registered with the Land Registry within 30 days of execution before the notary.

translations.text: La escritura de hipoteca se inscribirá en el Registro de la Propiedad dentro de los 30 días siguientes a su otorgamiento ante notario.

terms.context: The mortgage deed shall be registered with the Land Registry within 30 days of execution before the notary.
